OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marina Traneo for Plaintiff Academy of Art University, who is present.
Scott Peebles, Limited Scope Attorney for Defendant Jay Patio DBA Super Parking, Inc., who is present.

Settlement conference held. Parties entered into a signed agreement, which was not filed with this court. Settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 2300 Stockton Street, San Francisco, CA 94133.
